project_type: React SPA (Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind + Radix UI + Zustand)
build_system: pnpm workspaces, Vite bundler, biome formatter/linter
test_framework: vitest with jsdom environment, custom setup in src/test/setup.ts (mock localStorage, IntersectionObserver, ResizeObserver), test files colocated with source
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx tsc --noEmit && cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1) Run typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit from repo root. 2) Run tests: npx vitest run from repo root. 3) Build: cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build
setup_instructions: Already set up - pnpm install done, node_modules present
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install new packages. Must use existing dependencies only. Feature flags gate all risky additions.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, build + typecheck must pass after each commit, preserve existing functionality completely
key_patterns: Services use localStorage-backed mock stores (see OcrJobService.ts, AdminMetricsService.ts). Feature flags in featureFlags.ts gate new features. Types in lib/types.ts. Hooks in src/hooks/. Components in src/components/ui/. Tests follow describe/it pattern with vitest.
directory_structure: Root: package.json (workspace), vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.json. artifacts/edms/: main frontend app (src/pages, src/components, src/services, src/hooks, src/lib, src/store, src/test). config/: ocr_pipeline.yaml. lib/: api-client-react, api-spec, api-zod.
